title: Flaky American Corn Fritters
description: Crispy, lime‑bright fritters made from sweet corn, chickpea flour, and cornmeal, air‑fried for a quick solo dinner that's jain friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl whisk together chickpea flour, cornmeal, baking powder, cumin, salt, pepper, and lime zest until well combined.
Add the corn kernels to the dry mix and stir to coat.
Pour in lime juice, water, and mix until a thick, loose batter forms—add a little more water if it feels too dry.
Lightly spray the air fryer basket with oil spray. Spoon about 2 tablespoons of batter for each fritter, arranging them in a single layer.
Air fry for 10 minutes, flipping halfway through, until the fritters are golden and crisp.
Remove from the air fryer and let them cool for a minute before serving.
Serve hot with fresh lime wedges and optionally sprinkle chopped cilantro on top.
